qualifications.Name: BORN_IN_COUNTRY
qualifications.QuestionText: Were you born in the United Kingdom?
qualifications.QuestionTranslation: Were you born in the United Kingdom?

qualifications.Name: LIVE_IN_COUNTRY
qualifications.QuestionText: Are you currently living in the United Kingdom?
qualifications.QuestionTranslation: Are you currently living in the United Kingdom?

qualifications.Name: TIMEOUT
qualifications.QuestionText:
This survey requires you to stay on the website. When you switch tabs or leave the window, your participation will be terminated earlier.
If you wish to end the survey earlier, please press the early "termination" button provided on each survey page.
Please note that early termination will not result in compensation.
